---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: 'new feature'
assignees: ''

---

**Title**: [A concise title for the feature request]

---

**Description**:  
[A clear and detailed description of the feature you are requesting]

---

**Motivation**:  
[Explain why this feature is needed. What problem does it solve?]

---

**Proposed Solution**:  
[Outline a possible solution or approach to implement the feature. This could include technical details, design ideas, or user stories.]

---

**Alternatives Considered**:  
[Discuss any alternative solutions or features that were considered and why they were not chosen.]

---

**Additional Context**:  
[Any additional information that might be helpful, such as links to related discussions, mockups, or examples from other projects.]

---

**Priority Level**:  
[Indicate the priority of this request, e.g., low, medium, high.]
